mapper.select: SELECT ss.id, ss.subject_id, ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, ss.room, ss.semester, sub.subject_name FROM schedule_slot ss LEFT JOIN subject sub ON ss.subject_id = sub.id WHERE ss.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_slot (subject_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, room, semester) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{room}, #{semester})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM schedule_slot ORDER BY semester DESC
